HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Nov-20-2023 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Rosemary McCarthy, Esq., 408-569-5891, rmccarthy01@gmail.com, Specially appearing for Plaintiff UNIFUND CCR PARTNERS, (ZOOM)
Annmarie Garvey, 415-374-4185, Pro Per Defendant, (in Court)

PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR PARTNERS, A NEW YORK PARTNERSHIP HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

The claim is denied. Defendant failed to fill out the financial statement. Therefore, the court cannot determine whether the funds are necessary for her support and exempt per CCP 704.225.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
